results.owner_or_reason: Not a coverage-index key by itself (only ADR-0004/0008/0011/0015/0020/0035 present), but hard-check confirms coverage: this ADR formalizes A-QUOTA (owners ENG-2490, wiki-corpus) and A-QUOTA-HARDENING (owners ENG-2491, ENG-2492, wiki-corpus), both present coverage-index.json keys. QUOTA_EXCEEDED 402 vocabulary is implemented pervasively (lib, wiki, mcp, billing, staging E2-S5, workgraph E6-S3).
